description:
You are a platform engineer reviewing the latest CI/CD job output stored on disk.
A log file already exists at:

/home/user/build_logs/ci_build.log

Your objective is to produce a new file that lists only the ERROR events from that log.  
Requirements for the new file:

1. Create the file at exactly  
   /home/user/build_logs/ci_build_errors.log  
   (it must overwrite any file of the same name if it already exists).

2. The file must contain **only** the lines that meet all of the following rules:  
   • They come verbatim from /home/user/build_logs/ci_build.log.  
   • They include the literal text “[ERROR]” (including the square brackets).  
   • They preserve the original ordering found in the source log.  
   • No extra blank lines or added characters are allowed.

3. After you create /home/user/build_logs/ci_build_errors.log, output its first three lines to the console so that a reviewer can see the result (use any common technique such as head).

Only a single terminal command (pipelines are fine) should be used to generate the new file.

The automated test will verify that:  
• /home/user/build_logs/ci_build_errors.log exists.  
• It contains exactly the three expected ERROR lines, in the correct order, with a single trailing newline after the last line and no additional content.
truth:
Initial state before the agent starts:

Directory:
/home/user/build_logs  (already created, normal user ownership)

File:
/home/user/build_logs/ci_build.log  
Exact contents (each line ends with a single UNIX newline, \n):

[2023-09-12 10:15:01] [INFO] Starting build step 1
[2023-09-12 10:15:05] [ERROR] Failed to fetch dependencies
[2023-09-12 10:16:12] [WARN] Deprecated API usage
[2023-09-12 10:17:30] [INFO] Running unit tests
[2023-09-12 10:17:45] [ERROR] Unit test failures detected
[2023-09-12 10:18:02] [INFO] Build completed
[2023-09-12 10:18:06] [ERROR] Post-build hook failed

Final state expected after the agent finishes:

File:
/home/user/build_logs/ci_build_errors.log  
Exact required contents (each line followed by a single UNIX newline, \n):

[2023-09-12 10:15:05] [ERROR] Failed to fetch dependencies
[2023-09-12 10:17:45] [ERROR] Unit test failures detected
[2023-09-12 10:18:06] [ERROR] Post-build hook failed
